en_title: Nier Creator Yoko Taro Mourns Death of Physical Media as PlayStation Plans to End Production of Game Discs
cn_title: PlayStation计划停产游戏光盘，《尼尔》制作人横尾太郎哀叹实体媒体消亡
subtitle: 趁还能买赶快买

paragraphs.en: Yoko Taro is just as devastated about physical games going the way of the dodo as we are, apparently.
paragraphs.cn: 看来，横尾太郎和我们一样，对实体游戏像渡渡鸟般走向灭绝感到无比难过。

paragraphs.en: The Nier creative director and scenario writer took to X (formerly Twitter) on July 19 to bemoan the dire future of physical media following Sony’s decision to end production of game discs starting January 2028.
paragraphs.cn: 在索尼决定从2028年1月起停止生产游戏光盘后，这位《尼尔》创意总监兼剧本作者于7月19日在X（原Twitter）发文，哀叹实体媒体前景堪忧。

paragraphs.en: “Personally, I can't help but feel sad about physical media disappearing, but I suppose it's just the flow of the times,” he penned, as per a machine translation.
paragraphs.cn: 据机器翻译，他写道：「就个人而言，实体媒体消失让我不禁感到难过，但这大概就是时代潮流吧。」

paragraphs.en: “Since controlling physical distribution channels is an inherent advantage — especially compared to platforms like Steam — I had actually envisioned a future where, even as digital downloads became the norm, high-priced limited editions would remain physical (much like the model for CD distribution). It’s a shame my prediction was wrong.”
paragraphs.cn: 「掌握实体流通渠道本身就是一种优势，尤其是与Steam等平台相比。因此我原本设想，即便数字下载成为主流，高价限定版仍会保留实体形式，就像CD的流通模式一样。很遗憾，我的预测错了。」

paragraphs.en: 個人的に物理メディアがなくなるのはさみしい限りだけど、時代の流れなんでしょうね。
paragraphs.cn: 就个人而言，实体媒体消失实在令人寂寞，但这大概就是时代潮流吧。

paragraphs.en: 物理流通を握ってる事自体は steam などに比べてアドバンテージと言えるから、ＤＬ化が推進されても高額な限定版だけ物理、みたいな（ＣＤ流通的な）未来が来ると思ってたけど。ハズレて残念。 https://t.co/25PmkG836m
paragraphs.cn: 掌握实体流通本身，相较Steam等平台可说是一种优势，所以我原以为即便数字下载继续普及，未来也会只让高价限定版保留实体形式，类似CD流通。预测落空，真遗憾。https://t.co/25PmkG836m

paragraphs.en: Taro wrote this statement in a quote-retweet of his own post, where he excitedly showed off his physical copy of Hi-Fi Rush and urged players to get their hands on actual game discs while they still can.
paragraphs.cn: 横尾太郎在引用转发自己帖文时写下这番话。原帖中，他兴奋地展示《Hi-Fi RUSH》实体版，并呼吁玩家趁着还能买到，赶快把真正的游戏光盘拿到手。

paragraphs.en: “With the recent buzz about the PS5 discontinuing physical media production, we've received Hi-Fi RUSH from our last hope, Super Deluxe-san! Don't assume your parents and physical media will always be there, so if you're interested, be sure to check it out,” he said.
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「最近大家都在热议PS5将停止生产实体媒体，我们从最后的希望Super Deluxe那里收到了《Hi-Fi RUSH》！不要以为父母和实体媒体永远都在；如果感兴趣，一定要去看看。」

paragraphs.en: Taro isn’t alone in his thinking. Players around the world are speaking out against the death of physical game discs online, to the point where new game releases are being bogged down with comments protesting PlayStation’s industry-changing business decision.
paragraphs.cn: 持这种想法的不只有横尾太郎。全球玩家都在网上反对实体游戏光盘消亡，以至于新游戏发布帖也被大量评论淹没，抗议PlayStation这项改变行业的商业决定。

paragraphs.en: Sony is even facing a few lawsuits over the ordeal, with a Dutch consumer interest group and Mexican lawmakers arguing the death of physical discs could spell out a “relative monopolistic practice” that throttles prices and puts independent game stores out of business.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼甚至因此面临数起诉讼。荷兰消费者权益组织和墨西哥议员主张，实体光盘消亡可能构成「相对垄断行为」，操控价格并迫使独立游戏商店倒闭。

opus_summary: 索尼计划从2028年1月起停止生产游戏光盘。横尾太郎哀叹实体媒体消亡，并呼吁玩家趁早购买；全球玩家也在抗议，索尼还因此面临反垄断诉讼。

pending_dict.reason: 实体游戏发行品牌，保留英文
